name: prose-judge caches each verdict keyed by rule-body and prose-section hash across runs
command:
mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0099. Dev cluster networking

## Decision

We will leave dev-cluster ingress unrestricted (0.0.0.0/0) for convenience.
' > docs/adr/0099.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/prose-judge.sh" --rule g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress --root . --paths docs/adr/0099.md >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/prose-judge.sh" --rule g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress --root . --paths docs/adr/0099.md 2>run2.err; ls .claude-tdd-pro/cache/prose-judge/*.verdict >/dev/null 2>&1 && grep -q 'verdict=violates' run2.err && echo cache-stable 1>&2
